name: EazyDiner Credit Card

milestones.label: Additional ₹3,000 monthly dining discount cap unlocked upon spending ₹30,000 or more in the previous calendar month on non-dining transactions

milestoneBenefits: Additional ₹3,000 monthly dining discount cap unlocked upon spending ₹30,000 or more in the previous calendar month on non-dining transactions
additionalBenefits: Two complimentary movie tickets every month on BookMyShow (each ticket worth up to ₹200)
Complimentary premium alcoholic beverage for each diner at over 200 select restaurants booked via EazyDiner app
1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations in India
additionalDetails: Dining discount is capped at ₹2,000 per month without spends criteria
Spend ₹30,000 or more on non-dining transactions in the previous calendar month to unlock an additional ₹3,000 dining discount cap (total ₹5,000 per month)

salaried: Eligibility is subject to IndusInd Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to IndusInd Bank approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-27
Extra 25% discount is auto-applied and only applicable when booking and paying through the EazyDiner App via PayEazy. Not applicable for physical card payments, other cards, UPI, or wallets.
Extra 25% discount is not applicable if consecutive transactions are made at the same restaurant within 120 minutes or less.
Premium alcoholic beverage brand and serving size are at the sole discretion of the restaurant.

Complimentary domestic airport lounge access (previously 2 visits per calendar quarter) was discontinued effective 15 July 2025. Set loungeDomestic to 0 on 2026-06-07: EazyDiner is not listed among the participating cards in IndusInd's official domestic airport lounge access program, corroborated by the LiveFromALounge devaluation report.
